texto: Never does one open the discussion by coming right to the heart of the matter. For the heart of the matter is always somewhere else than where it is supposed to be. To allow it to emerge, people approach it indirectly by postponing until it matures, by letting it come when it is ready to come. There is no catching, no pushing, no directing, no breaking through, no need for a linear progression which gives the comforting illusion that one knows where one goes. Time and space are not something entirely exterior to oneself, something that one has, keeps, saves, wastes, or loses.
explicacao: Citação de Trinh T. Minh-ha sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Never does one open the discussion by coming right to the heart of the matter. For the heart of t…” articula amor, conversation, indirection em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como indirection e space.
